title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Technical Support II Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Gorakhpur has declared the official notification for the various recruitment of Project Technical Support II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 12th, Diploma, and DMLT can apply for the AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection Process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
